props.message: Raw hex used where a token role exists.

remediation.text: Reference a token role (e.g. bg-accent / text-surface) instead of raw hex.

props.message: var(--x) does not resolve to a declared token.

remediation.text: Use a declared role, or add the token to tokens.css.

props.message: Solid AI-default indigo used outside token definitions.

remediation.text: Use the design-system accent token, not a raw indigo hex.
Use the solid accent token; drop the gradient.
Use a flat surface + accent from the design system.
Use a real icon or omit it.

props.message: Rounded card with a colored left border.

remediation.text: Hairline border on all sides + the design-system shadow.

props.message: Sans-serif family on a display heading.

remediation.text: Headings must use the display font.
Remove fabricated metrics; use real copy or none.
Use a local asset or a neutral solid block.

props.message: Accent used more than ~2 times per screen.

remediation.text: Reserve the accent for the single most important element.
